data.name: XTSStringCommsError
data.value: Network communication to the XTS-W2 server has been lost. Communications Error: {0}

data.name: XTSStringNoSensors
data.value: No Sensors configured on the SPU

data.name: XTSStringStatusLearningAbort
data.value: CAUTION: Engine learning aborted by user.

data.name: XTSStringStatusLearningComplete2
data.value: Engine learning complete. Please send verification data to AMOT.

data.name: XTSStringStatusLearningNotCal
data.value: Engine learning procedure has not been completed. Indicated wear will be incorrect.

data.name: XTSStringStatusLearningS1
data.value: First stage "Preliminary engine learning" in progress {0} minute(s) remaining.

data.name: XTSStringStatusLearningS1Complete
data.value: First stage "Preliminary engine learning" complete waiting for next speed band entry.

data.name: XTSStringStatusLearningS1Start
data.value: First stage "Preliminary engine learning" waiting for speed band entry.

data.name: XTSStringStatusLearningS2
data.value: Second stage "Preliminary engine learning" in progress {0} minute(s) remaining.

data.name: XTSStringStatusLearningS2Complete
data.value: Second stage "Preliminary engine learning" complete, waiting for next speed band entry.

data.name: XTSStringStatusLearningS3
data.value: Third stage "Preliminary engine learning" in progress {0} minute(s) remaining.

data.name: XTSStringStatusLearningS4
data.value: Fine engine learning procedure in progress... {0} Hour(s) and {1} minute(s) remaining.

data.name: XTSStringStatusLearningS5
data.value: Fine engine learning procedure in progress... {0} Hour(s) and {1} minute(s) remaining.

data.name: XTSStringNoteAlarmTestModeAuto
data.value: Note: Alarm output test mode has been activated automatically.

data.name: XTSStringNoteRealTimeOnlySpanSupport
data.value: Note: For real time mode only time span is supported.

data.name: XTSStringMaxChannelsInFiringOrder
data.value: (Maximum 7 channels in the firing order - 1 per cylinder, SPU1)

data.name: XTSStringUnhandledErrorReportAdmin
data.value: An unhandled error occurred, please report it to your system administrator

data.name: XTSStringFunctionAccessDenied
data.value: You do not have permission to access the current function.

data.name: XTSStringCommsErrorOccurred
data.value: No response received from XTSW Server

data.name: XTSStringUserNotLoggedIn
data.value: The user could not be logged in.

data.name: XTSStringSpanGreaterThan0Mins
data.value: Span should be greater than {0} minutes

data.name: XTSStringStartDateLaterThanEndDate
data.value: The start date for the date range must be earlier than the end date

data.name: XTSStringTooManyTrendsInConfig
data.value:
The maximum number of trends within a configuration is {0}
Please deselect {1} trends.

data.name: XTSStringSureRemoveSelectedTrend
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove the selected trend?

data.name: XTSStringSureWishLogOut
data.value: Are you sure you wish to log off?

data.name: XTSStringLearningStartMsg
data.value:
STARTING THE LEARNING PROCEDURE SHOULD ONLY BE CARRIED OUT BY A HIGH LEVEL USER.
This process will automatically learn the engine profile.
All sensors must be adjusted at ''Bottom Dead Centre" via the "Sensor Setup" procedure before learning is started.
Please refer to the Installation and Maintenance sections of the manual for more information.
WARNING Any current indication of wear will be permanently lost.
Are you sure you wish to continue?

data.name: XTSStringLearningCancelMsg
data.value:
TERMINATING LEARNING MODE BEFORE COMPLETION WILL LEAD TO INCORRECT READINGS FROM ALL THE SENSORS!
ARE YOU SURE YOU WISH TO CANCEL?

data.name: XTSStringInitialLearningCompleteMsg
data.value:
Initial learning complete. The engine can be run at any speed.
In order to achieve the best possible engine profile, please run the engine at as many speeds as possible.

data.name: XTSStringLearningCompleteMsg
data.value:
Engine learning complete. Data will be represented with speed compensation applied.
In order to validate the system warranty: 1. Log On. 2. Press "Send Verification Data to AMOT" button.

data.name: XTSStringReportAlreadyInProgress
data.value: A report is already in progress

data.name: XTSStringReportStyleNeeded
data.value: A report style needs to be chosen

data.name: XTSStringDCModeSelectMsg
data.value:
The engine must be stationary and ready to be rotated on the 'turning gear'.
This process may take several minutes to complete.
Do not enter 'DC Mode' unless you are ready to use the turning gear.
Are you sure you wish to enter DC Mode?

data.name: XTSStringDCModeEngineRunningMsg
data.value:
The engine is running.
DC mode is unavailable.

data.name: XTSStringPeakCalibrationMsg
data.value:
The engine MUST have already been rotated at least one full revolution using the turning gear to setup the dc level offsets.
Please refer to the installation and maintenance sections of the manual for more information.
WARNING! The indication of wear can be lost when this operation is carried out.
Are you sure you wish to continue?

data.name: XTSStringCalibrateFiringOrderMsg
data.value: Ensure the engine is running in a forward direction.

data.name: XTSStringStateInsertOrCreateMsg
data.value: Do you wish to add {0} to the current trend configuration, or create a new one?

data.name: XTSStringStateLimitWarningMsg
data.value: The current configuration has the maximum number of trends. You can only create a new configuration.

data.name: XTSStringStateSaveOrDiscardMsg
data.value:
This will clear the existing trend configuration.
Do you wish to save the existing configuration before creating the new one?

data.name: XTSStringStateConfirmOverwriteMsg
data.value:
Are you sure?
This will overwrite the trend configuration.

data.name: XTSStringStateConfirmLoseExistingMsg
data.value:
Are you sure?
You will lose the current trend configuration.

data.name: XTSStringChildWindowNegativeResult
data.value: HandleResult has received a child window with a negative result

data.name: XTSDefaultFontFamily
data.comment: Default font name for silverlight controls

data.name: XTSStringCoreErrorDatabaseCorrupt
data.value: Database corrupt! Attempting to create new database.

data.name: XTSStringTimeSpanGreaterThanYears
data.value: The time span must be less than {0} years.

data.name: XTSStringTrendWarningNoSPU
data.value: Note: Due to SPU Communications failure latest data may not be available

data.name: XTSStringSettingsWarningNoSPU
data.value: Note: Due to SPU Communications failure, not all settings will be available

data.name: XTSStringCoreErrorRTUStart
data.value: All SPU communications have been lost (Serial Port Configuration)

data.name: XTSStringCoreErrorRTUExternal
data.value: All SPU communications have been lost (Incorrect External Serial Port Configuration)

data.name: XTSStringCoreErrorRTUDongle
data.value: All SPU communications have been lost (Connection Hardware Failure)

data.name: XTSStringCoreErrorRTURS485
data.value: All SPU communications have been lost (Not Replying To Modbus)

data.name: XTSStringRestartRequired
data.value: The software has been updated, press OK to update from the server.

data.name: XTSStringAlarmOutputTestCancelled
data.value: The test mode has been cancelled due to inactivity.

data.name: XTSStringCouldNotSetTestOutputMode
data.value: Could not set requested alarm output test mode

data.name: XTSStringSensorImportFileError
data.value: The import file format is invalid or does not match the selected sensor.

data.name: XTSStringFileDownloadError
data.value: Failed to download the requested file.

data.name: XTSStringWrongInput
data.value: Error in Alarm or Slowdown input

data.name: XTSStringAlarmGreaterThanSlowdown
data.value: The alarm setpoint cannot be higher than slowdown setpoint for channel {0}

data.name: XTSStringAlarmOutofRange
data.value: Alarm setpoint is out of range for channel {0}

data.name: XTSStringSlowdownOutofRange
data.value: Slowdown setpoint is out of range for channel {0}

data.name: XTSStringTemperatureSettingsComplete
data.value: Temperature settings have been submitted, please wait for 10 second for refreshing

data.name: XTSStringFailureLowLevelTemperature
data.value: Failure Low Level or Temperature Sensor Short Circuit

data.name: XTSStringFailureHighLevelTemperature
data.value: Failure High Level or Temperature Sensor Open Circuit

data.name: XTSStringFailureRPMORRTemperature
data.value: Failure RPM OOR or Temperature Sensor Loose Connection

data.name: XTSStringFailureNoPulseTemperature
data.value: Failure No Pulse or Temperature BTM module failure

data.name: XTSStringGenerateReportMessage
data.value: Generating the report may take up to {0} minutes, do you want to continue?

data.name: XTSStringReportComplete
data.value: Report is generated, please click "View Reports" to view it.

data.name: XTSStringImoErrorOccurred
data.value: This system has not been registered, please contact xtswsupport@amot.com for registration.
